questions.question: Consider a Markov Chain with a proposal distribution f(x'|x) that is a normal distribution with mean μ and variance σ^2. Calculate the expected value of f(x'|x), where x ~ N(μ, σ^2). (5 marks)

An MCMC chain is run for 1000 iterations, with a burn-in period of 500 iterations. The acceptance rate is 0.7. If the target distribution is π(x) = 1/x, calculate the average acceptance rate after the burn-in period. (10 marks)

Prove that the Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) method converges to the target distribution π(x) if the proposal distribution q(x'|x) satisfies the detailed balance equations: π(x)q(x|x') = π(x')q(x'|x) for all x and x'. (15 marks)
